signals.headline: Wrapped XRP (wXRP) Officially Launched on Solana Network via Hex Trust and LayerZero | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Wrapped XRP (wXRP) Officially Launched on Solana Network via Hex Trust and LayerZero | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Solana developers announced on April 18, 2026, that XRP can now be traded on Solana as wrapped wXRP tokens, bridged from the XRP network—locked on origin and minted equivalently on Solana for DeFi use, DEX trading, and wallet tracking[2][4].  
This followed a cryptic Solana "XRP" tweet

signals.raw:
Elon Musk April Tweet Count Markets Trending on Polymarket | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Polymarket's most active markets right now focus on **Elon Musk's tweet volumes**, such as "Elon Musk # tweets April 17 - April 24, 2026?" (29% on 200-219 range) and "Elon Musk # tweets in April 2026?" (18% on 1080-1119 range), with over $17.1M in trading volume across 130+ live tweet prediction markets[2][3][4].

signals.raw:
No whale bets, smart money moves, or mispriced markets reported in real-time X posts | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Search results show no current X posts from Polymarket traders discussing whale activity, smart money, or tips on mispriced markets like Nasdaq round-the-clock trading by June 30 or Kanye tweeting by April 30; instead, they highlight analytics tools for tracking top traders[1][3][5].
